（二十五）
一、根据短文内容，判断下列句子正(
T) 误 (F)。A man has a big treasure bow(聚宝盆)．Put one apple in it，you can get eighty-eight apples．How nice it is! Many people like it very much．A rich man wants it very much．He gets it from the man，but he doesn’t give the man money．The rich man puts some treasurein it，and he gets more. His father knows it and comes to have a look．He is very old，about eighty-eight．He dropsinto the bowl．Oh dear! The rich man has eighty-eight fathers now. They are all eighty-eight，they look the same．
1．A man has a big bowl full of apples．
2．People can get more things from the bowl．
3．A rich man has the same bowl too．
4．The rich man has an old father．
5．The rich man has eighty-eight fathers，they aren’t the same.
二、完形填空
In No***ern America, most students __1__ to school __2__ school bus. Some students also walk or ride bikes to school. In other parts of the world, things are __3__. In Japan, most students take trains to school, although __4__ also walk or ride their bikes. In China, it __5___ where you are. In big cities, students usually___6___ bikes to school or take buses. And in places where ___7___ rivers and lakes, like Hongshanhu and Kaishandao, students usually go to school __8__.That must__9__a lot more fun than __10__ a bus.
1.
A. go
B. going
C. goes
D. went
2.
A. by
B. on
C. ride
D. take
3.
A. different
B. difference
C. same
D. the different
4.
A. another
B. the other
C. other
D. others
5.
A. depend on
B. depend to
C. depends to
D. depends on
6.
A. rides
B. ride
C. on
D. by
7.
A. there are
B. there is
C. is there
D. are there
8.
A. by train
B. by taxi
C. by boat
D. on foot
9.
A. to be
B. is
C. being
D. be
10.
A. take
B. to take
C. taking
D. takes答案及详细解析
一、判断正误
1.  F
2.  T3.   F
4.   T5.   F
二、完形填空
1.  A 解析：go to school去学校。本文都用现在时态所以选A。
2.  A 解析：本题表示用某种交通工具，用by,跟on都可以，但如果用by的话后面不可以跟冠词代词等修饰词，本题用by school bus等于by the school bus.
3.  A 解析：be动词后用形容词。
4.  D 解析：本题泛指除了most之外的其他的一些人，用复数的不定代词others.
5.   D 解析：depend on表示取决于，主语有it应该用单三形式。
6.  B 解析：ride bikes表示骑自行车，如果用by应该用by bike.
7.  A 解析：后面是river and lakes是复数，根据就近原则，there be句型应该用复数。
8.  C 解析：前文提到前面提到的rivers and lakes，所以后文应该是坐船上学。
9.   D 解析：must是情态动词，情态动词应该用动词原形。
10.  C 解析：than做介词，后跟动名词。
